title: Allegra Allegra Song Lyrics Kanthaswamy
stanzas:
India Ponnu - Allegra Allegra Song Lyrics Kanthaswamy
#DSP #Rita #Viveka

Yo come on everybody
it’s time to roll
Let’s welcome
the Indian girl

India ponnuthango
Italy kannuthango
Naan oru minnalthango
dil irunda vango

Hey maeniye magnet thango
vaarthaye chocolate thango
Naan oru minsaramgo,
thalli ninnukongo

Red wine bottle naan
kashmir apple naan
golden angel naane

Adalam tango tango
Adikalam bongo bongo
Vazhkaye shorto longo
Vazhnduparpom vango

Padalam songo songo
Udhadugal veengo veengo
Vazhnthadu righto wrongo
Valvom inimel vango

ozone thaandi
nam osai pogattum
Vaanam kai thattume

Asaigal onno rendo
Adangidum manasum undo
Nam vizhi rendum rendo
Moodi vaipatheno

vanavil bendu endrum
pirainila bendu endrum
Solbavan muttal andro
Kuraiyai parthal nandro

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

Who is the lead actor in the movie Kandhasamy?

The lead actor in the movie Kandhasamy is Vikram.

Who composed the music for the song Allegra Allegra?

The music for the song Allegra Allegra was composed by Devi Sri Prasad.

What is the mood of the song Allegra Allegra?

The song Allegra Allegra has an energetic and upbeat mood.

When was the movie Kandhasamy released?

The movie Kandhasamy was released in the year 2009.

Who is the lyricist of the song Allegra Allegra?

The lyrics for the song Allegra Allegra were penned by Viveka.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Allegra Allegra from the movie Kandhasamy, released in 2009, features the lead actor Vikram and actress Shriya Saran. Composed by Devi Sri Prasad and sung by Rita, this energetic and upbeat track is a celebration of rhythm and style. The lyrics by Viveka add a vibrant touch, making it a perfect choice for parties and celebrations. The song captures the essence of joy and liveliness, resonating with audiences and leaving a lasting impression.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Allegra Allegra from the movie Kandhasamy is a vibrant and energetic track that showcases the dynamic beats of Devi Sri Prasad and the captivating vocals of Rita. This song, featuring the charismatic performances of Vikram and Shriya Saran, is a celebration of rhythm and style. Dive into this electrifying number and experience the pulsating energy it brings to the screen.
stanzaMeanings: Yo come on everybody it’s time to roll Let’s welcome the Indian girl
Allegra Allegra Allegra Ale-alegra Allegra Allegra Allegra Ale-ale.
The Indian girl is here, the Italian girl is here, I am a lightning girl, come from the heart.
Hey beauty, bring the magnet, bring the words, I am a spark, so get ready.
I have a red wine bottle, I am a Kashmir apple, I am the golden angel.
Allegra Allegra Allegra Ale-alegra Allegra Allegra Allegra Ale-ale..
Let’s dance together, let’s enjoy life, we will live long and happy.
Let’s sing a song, let’s enjoy the moments, whether it’s right or wrong, we will live on.
Let our voices reach beyond the ozone, let the sky be touched.
Allegra Allegra Allegra Ale-alegra Allegra Allegra Allegra Ale-ale..
Allegra Allegra Allegra Ale-alegra Allegra Allegra Allegra Ale-ale..
Are there one or two desires? Is there a mind that can settle? Are both our eyes closed?
In the rainbow, there is a bend, in the moonlight, there is a bend, if you see the truth, it will be clear.
Yesterday has gone, tomorrow is new, today is the place to be.
Allegra Allegra Allegra Ale-alegra Allegra Allegra Allegra Ale-ale.
